purpose: Machine-checkable production readiness contract for platform runtime configuration and preflight gates.

requiredSnippets: production runtime requires PLATFORM_JWT_SECRET to be changed from the development default
production runtime requires PLATFORM_JWT_SECRET to be at least 32 characters
production runtime requires PLATFORM_ADMIN_RESOURCE_DRIVER to be mysql, postgres, or sqlite
production runtime requires PLATFORM_SESSION_DRIVER to be mysql, postgres, or sqlite
production runtime requires PLATFORM_LIFECYCLE_HISTORY_DRIVER to be mysql, postgres, or sqlite
production runtime must not enable demo-data capability
production runtime requires PLATFORM_PUBLIC_BASE_URL to be an absolute HTTPS origin
production runtime requires a non-empty PLATFORM_TRUSTED_PROXIES policy

requiredEnv.name: PLATFORM_RUNTIME_ENV
requiredEnv.purpose: Selects production mode so startup runs the strict runtime gate.

requiredEnv.name: PLATFORM_PUBLIC_BASE_URL
requiredEnv.purpose: Canonical public HTTPS origin used for fail-closed API redirects without trusting request Host headers.

requiredEnv.name: PLATFORM_TRUSTED_PROXIES
requiredEnv.purpose: Exact IP and narrow CIDR allowlist for reverse proxies whose forwarded HTTPS signal may be honored.

requiredEnv.name: PLATFORM_HTTP_MAX_BODY_BYTES
requiredEnv.purpose: Positive bounded limit applied before JSON handlers and binders run.

requiredEnv.name: PLATFORM_JWT_SECRET
requiredEnv.purpose: Production admin and app bearer token signing secret; must be non-default and at least 32 characters.

requiredEnv.name: PLATFORM_ADMIN_RESOURCE_DRIVER
requiredEnv.purpose: Selects the GORM-backed admin resource repository in production.

requiredEnv.name: PLATFORM_ADMIN_RESOURCE_DSN
requiredEnv.purpose: Database DSN for the GORM-backed admin resource repository.

requiredEnv.name: PLATFORM_SESSION_DRIVER
requiredEnv.purpose: Selects the GORM-backed session repository in production.

requiredEnv.name: PLATFORM_LIFECYCLE_HISTORY_DRIVER
requiredEnv.purpose: Selects the GORM-backed lifecycle history repository in production.

requiredEnv.name: PLATFORM_LIFECYCLE_HISTORY_DSN
requiredEnv.purpose: Database DSN for lifecycle migration and seed history.

requiredEnv.name: PLATFORM_CACHE_DRIVER
requiredEnv.purpose: Selects Redis-backed cache and invalidation bus for production.

requiredEnv.name: PLATFORM_REDIS_ADDR
requiredEnv.purpose: Redis endpoint used for cache reads and distributed invalidation events.

requiredEnv.name: PLATFORM_DISABLE_DEMO_AUTH_PROVIDER
requiredEnv.purpose: Disables the built-in demo auth provider in production so local harness login cannot be used in deployed runtimes.

preflightCommands.purpose: Verifies production runtime rejection and accepted baseline.
Verifies the standard production env template and provides strict secret validation for private production env files.
Verifies plugin-style capability classifications, default/profile policy and external business boundaries before changing enabled capabilities.
Verifies runtime capability profiles before changing PLATFORM_CAPABILITIES.
Verifies admin resource, relation, generated-contract and platform gate freshness.
Verifies tenant, org-unit, role-group, area-code and optional personnel governance boundaries.
Verifies schema-driven form layout presets and slot boundaries before visual promotion.
Verifies stack, generated artifacts and engineering capability gates.
Verifies code generation remains preview-first and source-writing stays disabled until a reviewed promotion gate exists.
Verifies source-backed reference capability discovery before coverage or promotion decisions.
Verifies reusable foundation coverage and business boundary isolation.
Verifies admin requests use the platform API client and list queries stay structured, schema-whitelisted and injection-safe.
Verifies downstream App, H5 and mini-program clients stay behind generated App clients or platform request/upload ports.
Verifies optional personnel profile readiness without leaking HR resources into the default foundation.
Verifies the full task inventory, dependency order, resource-lock policies and parallel batch conflict rules before release planning.
Verifies approved stack, task dependencies, capability boundaries, reference extraction, visual gates and objective conflict policy.
Verifies full task inventory, unfinished promotion blockers, resource-lock conflicts and visual workflow gates before continuing implementation.
Verifies the active platform foundation goal is not marked complete while controlled unfinished nodes or external promotion blockers remain active.
Verifies every implemented task node has neat-freak cleanup, closeout evidence, resource-lock review, objective-conflict review and visual design-gate evidence where required.
Verifies the persistent platform foundation objective remains aligned across stack, reference-only boundaries, task blockers, visual gates, deployment topology and closeout policy.

Verifies draft-only promotion evidence templates, the non-submitted draft package generator and the submitted evidence package validator align with production-auth and source-writing approval schemas without becoming approval evidence.
Verifies shared admin UI text keeps Chinese and English dictionaries synchronized.
Verifies shared admin UI components, relation controls and resource console contracts.
Verifies the admin UI contract validator itself catches componentized table and settings-drawer drift.
Runs admin i18n, Refine, UI contract, TypeScript and Vite production build checks.
Rejects whitespace and patch formatting errors before release work.
Verifies enabled manifest coverage from the Go capability source.
Verifies JWT/session/provider hardening policy, Admin OIDC configuration and evidence boundaries, token-rotation controls and refresh-token family promotion gates.
Generates the non-mutating production auth promotion review packet with blockers, missing evidence and required preflight gates.
Verifies independent refresh-token-family runtime remains blocked until storage, reuse detection, revocation, Redis convergence and audit evidence are approved.
Verifies cache targets, invalidation rules, Redis pub/sub boundaries and session reload convergence.
Verifies deployment topology, Vercel boundary and production runtime requirements.
Verifies this production readiness contract stays aligned with code and docs.
Generates the non-mutating production operations dry-run plan from readiness policies.

policyPreflightRequirements.reason: Configuration backup/export can affect capability shape, cached settings and release task visibility.
Configuration restore can change enabled capability surfaces, cached resources and task-state evidence.
Database migration must stay aligned with enabled capability profiles and unfinished promotion blockers.
Credential rotation requires cache/session invalidation planning, production auth and Admin OIDC promotion evidence, refresh-token family promotion checks and visible release task state.

operationPolicies.purpose: Require reviewable backups or exports before production configuration changes, restores or generated contract promotion.
operationPolicies.rollbackRequirement: Keep the previous generated contracts, platform configuration export and database backup reference available before applying a production configuration change.
operationPolicies.auditRequirement: Record operator, timestamp, target environment, artifact locations and validation command output in the release or operations log.
prohibitedActions: overwrite production configuration without a reviewed backup artifact
promote generated contracts when validate-admin-resources or engineering-capabilities fails

operationPolicies.purpose: Keep configuration import and restore workflows outside default runtime APIs until dry-run, diff, review and rollback gates are explicitly implemented.
operationPolicies.rollbackRequirement: Every restore must identify the source backup, target environment, dry-run diff and rollback artifact before runtime data is changed.
operationPolicies.auditRequirement: A restore must write an operation record with actor, reason, source artifact, affected resources and validation output.
prohibitedActions: add a destructive import API to the default platform runtime
restore production data without dry-run diff and human approval

operationPolicies.purpose: Keep database migration execution tied to lifecycle manifests, GORM repositories, idempotency history and production preflight checks.
operationPolicies.rollbackRequirement: Schema changes must include a rollback or forward-fix plan and a database backup reference before production execution.
operationPolicies.auditRequirement: Migration operations must record capability, migration id, executor, target DSN class, startedAt, finishedAt and result.
prohibitedActions: run destructive migrations outside capability lifecycle declarations
run production migrations without GORM-backed lifecycle history

operationPolicies.purpose: Require explicit session, JWT secret, API-token and OIDC client credentials rotation planning before changing production credentials.
operationPolicies.rollbackRequirement: Rotation plans must identify overlap windows, invalidation behavior, OIDC provider rollback and rollback handling for admin JWTs, app JWTs and pgo_ API tokens.
operationPolicies.auditRequirement: Credential rotations must record actor, scope, affected token classes, invalidation decision and verification commands without logging secret values.
prohibitedActions: log raw JWT secrets, OpenID, UnionID or API token values
rotate production secrets without session impact review
promote Admin OIDC without production-like rehearsal, six-viewport browser acceptance and cleanup evidence

requiredSourceSnippets.contains: PLATFORM_CAPABILITIES must not include demo-data in production
rejects the standard template when strict secret checks are enabled
rejects unsafe production transport security settings
